title: Vietnamese Pho with Crisp Garlic
description: A flavorful and aromatic pho recipe with the added crunch of crispy garlic. Serve with your favorite toppings.

ingredients.name: Vietnamese
ingredients.notes: beef bones, preferably oxtail or beef neck bones

instructions: 1. In a large stockpot, char the beef bones over medium heat until caramelized.
2. Add the sliced ginger and garlic to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
3. Add the beef broth and bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to low and simmer for at least 1 hour.
5. Meanwhile, cook the sliced crisp garlic in a skillet over medium heat until crispy.
6. Strain the pho broth and discard the solids.
7. Slice the cooked beef into thin strips.
8. Assemble the pho by placing the beef and noodles into bowls and ladling the hot broth over the top.
9. Garnish with crispy garlic, bean sprouts, lime wedges, and your favorite toppings.
